Argument.Name: sourcePath
Argument.Description: Path to the .sln/.slnf/.slnx/.csproj file to load and analyze.

Argument.Name: outputPath
Argument.Description: Path to the .html/.json/.csv file to save the analysis into.

Option.Description: The analyzers to exclude, default is empty for none. Ex: "EC84;EC85;EC83"
The analyzers to include, default is empty for all. Ex: "EC72;EC75;EC81"
The minimum severity of the analyzers to run. Can be Info, Warning or Error. Default is Info.
